title: Implement MFA enrollment flow
next_action: Wait for security audit completion. Once report received, implement TOTP enrollment in lib/auth/mfa/enroll.ts following report recommendations.
notes: Blocked: security audit in progress (started 2026-03-28, expected completion 2026-04-05). Design spec in decisions/mfa-enrollment-design.md. Do not begin implementation until audit report confirms the proposed TOTP flow is acceptable.

title: Build contact deduplication algorithm
next_action: Confirm GIN index on contacts.email exists, then implement findDuplicates() in lib/crm/dedup/finder.ts
notes: Algorithm: multi-pass (exact email → fuzzy name → phone), confidence threshold 0.85. Architecture decision logged in decisions/contact-dedup-algorithm.md. Stub files created in lib/crm/dedup/.

title: Set up Zod form validation schemas
notes: Completed 2026-03-30. Schemas in lib/validations/. Pattern established for all future form validation — reference this task when adding new forms.
